traps.description: No lock: get/put mutate OrderedDict (move_to_end, popitem, __setitem__) without synchronisation. CPython's GIL does not make these compound operations atomic.
traps.summary: get/put mutate the OrderedDict with no lock; the GIL doesn't make them atomic.

traps.description: Eviction loop uses > capacity instead of >= capacity; cache grows one entry beyond limit before evicting.
traps.summary: Eviction uses > instead of >= capacity, so the cache overgrows by one.

traps.description: capacity=0: eviction check (0 > 0) is false, so first put inserts an entry instead of being a no-op.
traps.summary: capacity=0 isn't a no-op; the first put still stores an entry.

traps.description: get() does not check TTL; expired entries are returned as if still valid. The starter stores inserted_at but never compares it to time.monotonic() - ttl.
traps.summary: get() never checks TTL, so expired entries are returned as valid.
